pi_items.source: Task utilities explicitly state in line 3-4: 'This environment uses REAL websites (https://crawler-test.com/) NO local test servers are used'; setup_screamingfrog.sh lines 107-110 confirm REAL public websites used; environment README line 70 states 'This environment uses real website data'

privileged_info_summary: This task requires crawling https://crawler-test.com/, a legitimate real public SEO testing website designed specifically for testing web crawlers and SEO tools. The target domain is crawler-test.com. The task uses Screaming Frog SEO Spider version 23.2 (a proprietary but free-tier desktop crawler). The crawl results are exported to two CSV files in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/: meta_refresh_audit.csv (containing meta refresh redirects) and js_redirect_audit.csv (containing JavaScript redirects). These redirect types are confirmed to exist on crawler-test.com based on web searches showing the site includes meta refresh and JavaScript redirect test pages. A summary report is required at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/redirect_remediation_summary.txt explaining why these non-standard redirect types should be converted to 301 redirects. The environment uses real website data, not synthetic test data.
